reasoning: Lactate clearance is your limiter. Your last ride was at a low intensity, indicating recovery mode. We need to sharpen your ability to clear lactate for the grind up Alpine Loop's main climb. Over-unders replicate the changing demands you'll face on routes like Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12 min: 3 min at 242W, 3 min at 256W, 3 min at 242W, 3 min at 201W. Recover 3 min at 75W between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
